---
description: "Use when writing or updating AWS CLF-C02 study notes, AWS service summaries, comparisons, or documentation in this repository. Verify current official AWS product pages before adding or changing AWS service descriptions."
name: "AWS Docs Verification"
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# AWS Documentation Verification

- Before writing or revising AWS service descriptions, comparisons, or study notes, check the latest official AWS documentation or product pages online.
- Prefer the official AWS product overview page and the `/features/` page when both exist.
- If the standard `/features/` page is missing, redirected, or low value, use the main product page and another closely related official AWS page instead.
- Preserve the current official AWS service name used on the page, even if older naming still appears elsewhere. Mention the older name in the description if it is commonly used, but do not use it as the primary name.
- Keep summaries exam-focused and concise. Paraphrase AWS wording instead of copying it.
- If a claim cannot be confirmed from current official AWS sources, do not state it as fact.
